base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of score_popups_fruit_bonuses — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. Score-popup numbers for eaten bonus fruits: 100 / 300 / 500 / 700 / 1000 / 2000 / 3000 / 5000 (pink-text for fruit). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Score-popup numbers for eaten bonus fruits: 100 / 300 / 500 / 700 / 1000 / 2000 / 3000 / 5000 (pink-text for fruit)
